_note: The campaign is just beginning. Session recaps will be added here after each session.

session_0.title: Foundry Session (Level-Up and Practice)
session_0.summary: The party met to level up characters and run a brief practice session to get familiar with the new system (D&D 5e 2024 Edition). Not a full story session — used to test mechanics and get everyone on the same page before the campaign begins.
session_0.notes: Last pre-campaign session. The DM has committed that this was the final prep session — real play begins now.

session_1.title: The Last Toll
session_1.summary: A standalone one-shot set in a pirate haven at the edge of the known world, on a night when the known world decides to change. Designed as a complete experience on its own and the party's first real chance to sit down together and find out how they play now that they know each other better.
session_1.notes: This is the 'Ma moment' — the pause between all the preparation and the campaign itself, the space where the table figures out how they play together.
